title: Alphabet shares fall on report its most powerful AI model Gemini 3.5 Pro is delayed
summary_full: Alphabet announced the Gemini 3.5 Pro AI  in May, saying it was being used internally but wouldn't be ready for a broader rollout until the following month.
summary_public: Alphabet announced the Gemini 3.5 Pro AI  in May, saying it was being used internally but wouldn't be ready for a broader rollout until the following month.
